title: SQL: Armada sinks MonetDB ships
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s49__armada (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO s49__armada (id, name) VALUES (1, 'First Ship');
INSERT INTO s49__armada (id, name) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM s49__armada WHERE name IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id FROM s49__armada WHERE id > 10) AS subquery;
key_bug_features: Counting rows in an empty table
